name: maze of pits
description: I'm in a maze of pits
hints: There is a treasure here and an arrow pointing down. Both are important.
The Persian Rug is a magic carpet! There is a magic word that activates it. Check the sign at the bottom of the chasm.
SAY AWAY while holding the Persian Rug to fly out of the maze. Also, go DOWN following the arrow to reach the chasm bottom.
GET RUG then SAY AWAY to teleport to the meadow. Or go DOWN to the chasm bottom (room 18) for the golden net treasure.

effects: Message: Something I'm holding vibrates and...
Message: You may need to say magic words here

notes: Contains the Persian Rug treasure which doubles as a magic flying carpet. SAY AWAY while holding it teleports you to the meadow (room 23). The arrow points DOWN to the chasm bottom (room 18) where the golden net is.
